name: Razorpay Merchant Support AI — LangChain4j
scenario: Razorpay wants to rebuild their merchant support chat using LangChain4j's cleaner interface API. The new system needs conversation memory per session, real-time payment data via tools, and multi-tenant isolation between merchants.

core.description: RazorpaySupportAI @AiService interface: help(@UserMessage String msg, @MemoryId String sessionId). @SystemMessage defining Razorpay assistant persona.
PaymentLookupTools @Component: @Tool getPaymentStatus(paymentId) and @Tool getRefundStatus(paymentId). Descriptions accurate. Methods return String.
ChatMemoryProvider @Bean: MessageWindowChatMemory.builder().maxMessages(10).id(memoryId).build(). Each sessionId gets independent memory.
TenantKeyBuilder @Service: build(merchantId, conversationId) → 'merchantId:conversationId'. isValid(key) checks format.
MemoryIsolation test: verify two different sessionIds get different ChatMemory instances (assertNotSame).
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): tools work, memory isolated, interface has @SystemMessage, composite key correct. All 4 pass.

bonus.description: TokenStream streaming: streamAnswer(@UserMessage q) method on interface. StreamingController converts to SSE Flux<String> with onNext/onComplete/onError.
Structured output: RouteTicketAI interface with classify(@UserMessage ticket) → TicketRoute record. Test: method return type is TicketRoute.
Memory expiry: TenantMemoryManager tracks lastAccess per key. isExpired() returns true after 30 minutes. clearExpired() removes stale entries.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. @MemoryId: must be a unique per-session identifier — never hardcode. Use merchantId:conversationId composite key. Different values = different memory (LangChain4j creates one ChatMemory per unique memoryId). @Tool(description): the description tells the AI WHEN to call this method. Make it clear and specific: 'Get the current status of a Razorpay payment by its payment ID'. ChatMemoryProvider @Bean: registered as a Spring Bean, LangChain4j auto-wires it to your @AiService. MessageWindowChatMemory: keeps last N messages. When maxMessages exceeded, oldest message dropped (sliding window). @AiService Spring annotation: triggers LangChain4j Spring Boot auto-configuration to create the implementation Bean.
